summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BIBI Cars CRM BLOCKS 2, 3, 4. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend navigation, calculator, and admin access functional. Auto-task creation confirmed working.
passed_tests: Admin login with admin@crm.com / admin123 - JWT token received
Homepage loading with BIBI Cars branding
Calculator ports endpoint - 4 ports, 4 vehicle types
Calculator calculation - $22,139 total with full breakdown
Admin leads access - 106 lead elements found
Admin tasks access - 19 task elements found with 2 auto-created tasks per lead
Header navigation - Home, Cars, VIN Check, Calculator, Cabinet links work
Footer with contacts and navigation links
Calculator page /calculator with full cost breakdown ($22,139 for $15k car, $25,799 for $18k SUV)
Loading/Empty/Error states on /cars page - proper empty state handling
SEO - page titles change on navigation (Calculator: 'Калькулятор доставки авто з США - BIBI Cars', Cars: 'Каталог авто з США - BIBI Cars')
Role-based access - admin sees all sections (Dashboard, Leads, Clients, Deals)
Auto-create task when new lead created - confirmed 2 tasks created per lead
Tasks appear in admin with priority and due date
Full Flow: Homepage -> Cars -> Calculator -> Lead calculation working

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major functionality working, minor UI form submission feedback could be improved)
